Background-Entertainer — Female Human Fighter
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 13 (+1) Intelligence: 16 (+3) Wisdom: 11 (+0) Charisma: 11 (+0)
Background: Entertainer Alignment: Chaotic Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Constitution: 2; Dexterity: 1 Experience: 158/300 Level: 1 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes: Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +2
Feat Count: Fighting Style: 1; General: 0; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighter Primary Ability)
Feats: Archery; Magic Initiate (Wizard) Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Fighter Features: Armor Training (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Fighter Primary Ability; Fighting Style; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion; Perception, Survival); Strength; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Entertainer Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Strength, Dexterity, Charisma); Musician; Skill Proficiency (Acrobatics; Performance); Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Musical Instrument)
Feature Notes:
Fighter Primary Ability: 1 selection
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Musician: TODO
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +4 Insight: (wis) +0 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +0 Persuasion: (cha) +2

Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +0 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +0 Nature: (int) +3 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +3 Perception: (wis) +0 Survival: (wis) +0
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Animal Handling; Perception, Survival; Performance; Persuasion; Sleight Of Hand
Languages: Common; Elvish; Halfling
Skill Notes:
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Combat
Hit Points: 7 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 18
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Scale Mail Shield: Shield Weapons: Battleaxe (+3 1d8+1 S [2h d10]; Topple); Longsword (+3 1d8+1 S [2h d10]; Sap); Scimitar (+4 1d6+2 S; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+3 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+1 hit points 2 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 3 chosen kinds of proficient weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +0; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +2; Intelligence: +3; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +0
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: W0: 2; W: 1 Attack: W: +5 Spell DC: W: 13
Magic Notes: Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Notes
Validation Errors:
